THE LIT DESIGN AWARDS IS OPEN TO SUBMISSIONS, FROM LIGHTING MANUFACTURERS, DESIGNERS AND PRACTISES FROM AROUND THE WORLD. 

Selected by our esteemed jury of designers and leaders in the lighting, interior design, and architectural fields, the annual winners will receive the LIT trophy, extensive publicity showcasing their designs and products to an international audience, and more.

DISCOVER A SELECTION OF OUTSTANDING LIGHTING DESIGNS!

The LIT Lighting Design Awards takes pride in acknowledging the outstanding contributions of some of the industry's most brilliant minds.

After a multi-round of votes, the jury members select the winners in professional and student categories. The judges evaluate each project based on their own merit; rewarding the most pioneering and ground-breaking lighting designs and selecting those standing out. LIT LIGHTING DESIGN AWARDS JURY MEMBERS

LIT Lighting Design Awards is an annual competition that celebrates outstanding achievements in lighting design. Every submission is evaluated by a diverse grand jury panel consisting of seasoned and well-respected academics, professionals, press members, entrepreneurs, and influential figures from the lighting design community.
